title: RuntimeEvidenceIndex
description: Machine-readable index of runtime evidence scenarios. Generated by build_evidence_pack.py from .txt scenario files in --extra-dir.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for the runtime evidence index.

generated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the index was generated.

head_commit.description: Head commit hash at the time of index generation.

scenarios.description: List of runtime evidence scenarios extracted from .txt files.

source.description: Command or script that produced the scenario result.

generated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when this scenario was generated.

code_version.description: Head commit hash at the time this scenario was generated.

is_stale.description: True when code_version does not match the top-level head_commit, indicating the scenario result may be outdated.

stale_count.description: Number of scenarios with is_stale=true (code_version mismatch with head_commit).

stale_signals.description: Human-readable list of staleness signals (code_version mismatches).

metadata_warnings.description: Human-readable list of metadata completeness warnings (e.g. missing generated_at). These do not affect is_stale.

scenarios.name: composite_force
scenarios.expected: Composite force calculation returns correct vector sum
scenarios.actual: Vector sum matches expected value within tolerance

scenarios.name: gateway_timeout_recovery
scenarios.expected: Gateway retries up to 3 times before returning timeout error
scenarios.actual: Gateway returns immediately without retry on 504
scenarios.notes: Known issue — retry logic not yet implemented for 504 responses
